body.p: 15thInternational Conference on VLSI (VLSI 2024) will provide an excellent international forum for sharing knowledge and results in theory, methodology and applications of VLSI. Original, unpublished papers, describing research in the general area of VLSI are solicited. Both theoretical and experimental research results are welcome in the following areas, but are not limited to. The conference focuses on all technical and practical aspects of high performance computing, green computing, pervasive computing, cloud computing etc.
